MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS LEONARD GORDON MD, KATHLEEN WELSH MD'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON COMPLAINT TO DETERMINE VALIDITY OF ELECTION AND APPOINTMENT OF DIRECTOR CORPORATIONS CODE 709. Appearances: Henry L. Glasser (434.2050) for plaintiffs and moving parties; Michon M. Spinelli of Bledsoe Cathcart Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa LLP (981.5411) for defendant and responding party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order upon complying with CRC 3.1312. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
